name: finance-nvidia-overview
description: Use web_search to search for 'NVIDIA financial performance revenue 2025 2026'. Summarize NVIDIA's current financial position in 3 bullet points. Include latest revenue figure. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer:
- NVIDIA reported fiscal year 2026 revenue of $215.9 billion, up 65% year-over-year, with Q4 FY2026 reaching a record $68.1 billion (up 73% YoY).
- Gross margins remained strong at ~75% in Q4 FY2026, with non-GAAP EPS of $4.77 for the full year.
- The company guided Q1 FY2027 revenue of $78 billion, reflecting continued exponential AI compute demand driven by the Blackwell architecture ramp.
key_facts: NVIDIA fiscal year 2026 revenue was $215.9 billion, up 65% from FY2025's $130.5 billion
Q4 FY2026 revenue was $68.1 billion, up 73% year-over-year
Q1 FY2027 guidance is approximately $78 billion in revenue
Non-GAAP gross margin was 75.2% in Q4 FY2026
FY2025 revenue was $130.5 billion, up 114% year-over-year
